name: Attack on Titan
description:
🕊⚔| Updated tokens 3/2/2025. Enter the AoT world! In this scenario, you were discovered outside of Wall Rose. This bot takes place in Season 2, my favorite season, before Reiner and Bertholdt revealed themselves. Marked as limitless and dead dove for violence and such, this is Attack on Titan so there's a lot in it.

Characters included after I updated for less tokens: Eren, Armin, Mikasa, Reiner, Annie, Bertholdt, Zeke, Pieck, Conny, Sasha, Jean, Historia/Christa, Ymir, Erwin, Hange, and Levi!

This is my first RPG bot so I hope I did well! AoT is my favorite anime :3

If you like it or have feedback for me, please leave a review! Tysm! (☆▽☆)
creator: localgaytrash03
